name: bandit_live_world_nearby_camp_real_fire_v0_2026-04-27
description: Real player-action fire proof footing: reuse the McWilliams/Basecamp playtest-kit save, set the save to nighttime, seed a real bandit_camp just beyond direct-player range, then let the scenario deploy a brazier, drop wood fuel, and light it through the normal lighter/firestarter UI. No raw map fields are injected by this fixture.
